race.comment: OKESUTORA (5) ran below expectations last time at Eagle Farm over 1800m but led over the same trip at the Sunshine Coast prior just beaten. Drops back in grade off those with a handy 2kg claim and has been kept up to the mark with a Gatton trial. Draws low and is well placed to be winning. REVELAIDE (16) built on a nice third two starts back at Sunshine Coast with a win over 2450m at Beaudesert 3-weeks ago, getting home by 2.5 lengths. We know he will run it right out and he has to be seriously considered. MEDICAL AUTOCRAT (6) was tracking well before a plain effort at the Sunshine Coast. We should see a better effort from him back home. TEWKESBURY (4) was an easy winner this trip at Grafton. Needs a good ride but can get into the money of things go his way. MAURITA (15) is a backmarker who gets home hard. Don't underestimate.
